summary: Tested User Profile Creation feature - all tests passed. Profile creation with unique ID generation (format: [NAME]-[DOB]-[HASH]) working correctly. Backend APIs and frontend UI integration verified. Previous features (language selector, feedback buttons, chat) still working.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/consular/create-profile - Creates profile with unique ID, returns {success: true, profile_id: 'XXXX-YYYYMMDD-HASH'}
✅ Backend /api/consular/create-profile - Handles duplicate email correctly (returns existing profile)
✅ Backend /api/consular/create-profile - Validates required fields (returns 422 for missing fields)
✅ Backend /api/consular/profile/{id} - Retrieves profile by ID with all fields
✅ Frontend - Create Profile button visible in left panel
✅ Frontend - Profile dialog opens with all fields (Name, Email, Mobile, DOB)
✅ Frontend - Profile ID generated in format [NAME]-[DOB]-[HASH] (e.g., RAJE-19850615-04R3)
✅ Frontend - Profile info displays in left panel after creation (shows name and ID)
✅ Frontend - Profile badge shows at bottom left corner
✅ Frontend - Chat message confirms profile creation with all details
✅ Frontend - Toast notification shows 'Profile created! ID: XXXX'
✅ Previous Feature - Language selector working (5 languages available)
✅ Previous Feature - Feedback buttons (👍👎) appear under bot responses
✅ Previous Feature - Feedback click shows toast and changes button state
✅ Previous Feature - Chat functionality working with AI responses
✅ Previous Feature - Mic, Camera, Upload buttons present and functional

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all profile creation and previous features verified)

seed_data_creation: Test profiles created during testing with TEST_ prefix emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Profile feature fully implemented and tested. Profile ID format: [NAME][DOB][HASH] (e.g., RAJE-19850615-04R3). Profile stored in MongoDB user_profiles collection. Full flow verified: Create Profile button -> fill form -> submit -> profile shows in left panel, badge at bottom left, confirmation in chat. All previous features (language selector, feedback buttons, chat, voice) still working.

mocked_apis.avatar_video: Avatar video is a placeholder image. Full video avatar with lip-sync available with Akool.com upgrade (noted in UI)

ui_elements.create_profile_button: Visible in left panel below status indicator
ui_elements.profile_dialog: Opens with 4 fields: Name, Email, Mobile, DOB
ui_elements.profile_info: Displays in left panel after creation
ui_elements.profile_badge: Shows at bottom left corner with profile ID

feedback_buttons.behavior: Click shows toast, button changes to selected state
